headline: Jim Cramer Discusses D.R. Horton and Hopes for Rate Cuts
summary: D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE:RTX) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s recent Mad Money game plan. Presenting a scenario in which interest rates come down, Cramer said: My hope post-war is that interest rates come down. The new Kevin Warsh-led Federal Reserve cuts rates, and housing explodes. If that happens, D.R. Horton stock will […]
